author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
śrī⋅śrī⋅guru⋅gaurāṅga⋅gāndharvikā⋅giridhārī
śrī⋅śrī⋅rādhā⋅vinoda⋅vihārī⋅jīu kī jaya,

[ <eng>now your dīkṣā⋅guru’s name should be glorified</eng> ]

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa oṁ
viṣṇu⋅pāda aṣṭottara⋅śata⋅
śrī⋅śrīmad⋅bhakti⋅vedānta
nārāyaṇa gosvāmī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa oṁ
viṣṇu⋅pāda aṣṭottara⋅śata⋅
śrī⋅śrīmad⋅bhakti⋅vedānta
vāmana gosvāmī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa oṁ
viṣṇu⋅pāda aṣṭottara⋅śata⋅
śrī⋅śrīmad⋅bhakti⋅prajñāna
keśava gosvāmī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa oṁ
viṣṇu⋅pāda aṣṭottara⋅śata⋅
śrī⋅śrīla bhakti⋅siddhānta
sarasvatī gosvāmī prabhupāda kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa paramahaṁsa bābājī
śrī⋅śrīla gaura⋅kiśora⋅dāsa gosvāmī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa śrī⋅śrīla saccidānanda
bhakti⋅vinoda ṭhākura kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa vaiṣṇava⋅sārvabhauma
śrīla jagannātha⋅dāsa bābājī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya samasta⋅rūpānugā⋅gauḍīya⋅guru⋅varga kī jaya,
jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa oṁ
viṣṇu⋅pāda aṣṭottara⋅śata⋅
śrī⋅śrīmad⋅bhakti⋅vedānta svāmī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya nitya⋅līlā⋅praviṣṭa oṁ
viṣṇu⋅pāda aṣṭottara⋅śata⋅
śrī⋅śrīmad⋅bhakti⋅vedānta
trivikrama gosvāmī mahārāja kī jaya,

jaya gauḍīya vedāntācārya śrīla
baladeva vidyā⋅bhūṣaṇa prabhu kī jaya,
jaya śrīla viśvanātha cakravartī ṭhākura kī jaya,

jaya śrīla narottama⋅śrīnivāsa⋅
śyāmānanda⋅prabhu⋅traya kī jaya,
jaya śrīla kṛṣṇa⋅dāsa kavi⋅rāja gosvāmī prabhu kī jaya,
jaya śrīla vṛndāvana⋅dāsa ṭhākura kī jaya,

jaya śrī⋅rūpa, sanātana, bhaṭṭa⋅raghunātha,
śrī⋅jīva, gopāla⋅bhaṭṭa, dāsa⋅raghunātha
ṣaḍ⋅gosvāmī prabhu kī jaya,

jaya śrī⋅svarūpa⋅dāmodara⋅
rāya⋅rāmānandādi gaura⋅pārṣada⋅vṛnda kī jaya,
jaya nāmācārya śrīla hari⋅dāsa ṭhākura kī jaya,

premase kaho śrī⋅kṛṣṇa⋅caitanya⋅
prabhu⋅nityānanda⋅śrī⋅advaita⋅gadādhara⋅
śrīvāsādi⋅śrī⋅gaura⋅bhakta⋅vṛnda kī jaya,

śrī⋅antardvīpa māyāpura, sīmantadvīpa,
godrumadvīpa, madhyadvīpa, koladvīpa, ṛtudvīpa,
jahnudvīpa, modadrumadvīpa, rudradvīpātmaka
śrī⋅navadvīpa⋅dhāma kī jaya,

śrī⋅śrī⋅rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅gopa⋅gopī⋅go⋅
govardhana dvādaśa⋅vanātmaka
śrī⋅vraja⋅maṇḍala⋅dhāma kī jaya,

śrī⋅rādhā⋅kuṇḍa⋅śyāma⋅kuṇḍa⋅gaṅgā⋅
jamunā⋅tulasī⋅bhakti⋅devī kī jaya,
śrī⋅jagannātha⋅baladeva⋅subhadrā⋅sudarśanaju kī jaya,

śrī⋅gopīśvara⋅mahādeva kī jaya,
śrī joga⋅māyā paurṇamāsī devī kī jaya,

śrīmatī vṛndā⋅devī kī jaya
śrī⋅nṛsiŋha⋅varāha⋅deva kī jaya,
bhakta⋅pravara śrī⋅prahlāda mahārāja kī jaya,

cāri⋅dhāma, sampradāya, ācārya⋅vṛnda kī jaya,
vraja⋅patana⋅śrī⋅caitanya⋅maṭha kī jaya,

śrī⋅keśavajī gauḍīya maṭha o tat⋅śākhā⋅maṭha⋅samūha kī jaya,
śrī⋅harināma⋅saṅkīrtana kī jaya,

ananta⋅koṭī vaiṣṇava⋅vṛnda kī jaya,
śrī⋅gaura⋅premānande hari hari bola
en_translation:
All glories to Śrī Śrī Guru, Gaurāṅga, Gāndharvikā, Giridhārī, and Śrī Śrī Rādhā-Vinoda-bihārī-jīu!

Now your dīkṣā-guru's name should be glorified.

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedānta Nārāyaṇa Gosvāmī Mahārāja!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedānta Vāmana Gosvāmī Mahārāja!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīmad Bhakti Prajñāna Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīla Bhaktisiddhānta Sarasvatī Gosvāmī Prabhupāda!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Paramahaṁsa Bābājī Śrī Śrīla Gaura Kiśora Dāsa Gosvāmī Mahārāja!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Śrī Śrīla Saccidānanda Bhaktivinoda Ṭhākura!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Vaiṣṇava-sārvabhauma Śrīla Jagannātha Dāsa Bābājī Mahārāja!

All glories to the entire Rūpānuga Gauḍīya Guru-varga! All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedānta Svāmī Mahārāja!

All glories to nitya-līlā-praviṣṭa Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedānta Trivikrama Gosvāmī Mahārāja!

All glories to Gauḍīya Vedāntācārya Śrīla Baladeva Vidyābhūṣaṇa Prabhu! All glories to Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura!

All glories to the three Lords: Śrīla Narottama, Śrīnivāsa, and Śyāmānanda! All glories to Śrīla Kṛṣṇa⋅dāsa Kavirāja Gosvāmī Prabhu! All glories to Śrīla Vṛndāvana Dāsa Ṭhākura!

All glories to the Six Gosvāmīs: Śrī Rūpa, Sanātana, Bhaṭṭa Raghunātha, Śrī Jīva, Gopāla Bhaṭṭa, and Dāsa Raghunātha!

All glories to the associates of Gaura, including Śrī Svarūpa Dāmodara and Rāya Rāmānanda! All glories to Nāmācārya Śrīla Haridāsa Ṭhākura!

Say with love: All glories to Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya, Prabhu Nityānanda, Śrī Advaita, Gadādhara, Śrīvāsa, and all the devotees of Gaura!

All glories to Śrī Navadvīpa-dhāma, which consists of Antardvīpa (Māyāpura), Sīmantadvīpa, Godrumadvīpa, Madhyadvīpa, Koladvīpa, Ṛtudvīpa, Jahnudvīpa, Modadrumadvīpa, and Rudradvīpa!

All glories to Śrī Vraja-maṇḍala-dhāma, consisting of the twelve forests, Śrī Śrī Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa, the cowherd boys and girls, the cows, and Govardhana Hill!

All glories to Śrī Rādhā-kuṇḍa, Śyāma-kuṇḍa, Gaṅgā, Yamunā, Tulasī, and Bhakti-devī! All glories to Śrī Jagannātha, Baladeva, Subhadrā, and Sudarśana-jīu!

All glories to Śrī Gopīśvara Mahādeva! All glories to Śrī Yogamāyā Paurṇamāsī Devī!

All glories to Śrīmatī Vṛndā Devī! All glories to Śrī Nṛsiṁha and Varāhadeva! All glories to the best of devotees, Śrī Prahlāda Mahārāja!

All glories to the four Dhāmas, the four Sampradāyas, and the Ācāryas! All glories to Vrajapaṭṭana Śrī Caitanya Maṭha!

All glories to Śrī Keśavajī Gauḍīya Maṭha and all its branch Maṭhas! All glories to Śrī Harināma-saṅkīrtana!

All glories to the unlimited millions of Vaiṣṇavas! Chant "Hari! Hari!" in the bliss of Gaura-prema!
